productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Printed Blue Tshirt
description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and tape in-seam, short sleeves, flat seams, reinforced tear points, branding printed on the chest and a vented hemFitRegularWash careHand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shadeEnjoy those mind-calming sessions of yoga in style and comfort in this urban yoga t-shirt. Made of pure, sweat absorbent cotton, this tee is stitched with flat seams and a printed label to prevent irritation, allowing you to concentrate on your yoga activity. Reinforced tear points give strength, while the grippy fabric ensures it doesn't slip and cause discomfort when you exercise. The stretchable, soft fabric and split hem is all that you need to feel at ease during those exercise sessions. Team this with urban yoga pants or capris for that ultimate in comfort.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
